title: roldana hartwegii
intro: Roldana hartwegii, also known as a Mexican sage or Hartweg's Roldana, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Roldana hartwegii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Roldana hartwegii can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
